items.title: Shocks Are Part Of Life; Sentiment Coming Into Them Matters
items.description: Coming into 2026, most asset markets were exhibiting excessive optimism - pricing the best of all possible outcomes.

items.description: The S&P 500 index includes a broad variety of companies. Some of them pay little to no dividends, while others offer decent yields. items.title: Better S&P 500 ETF: State Street's SPY vs. Vanguard's VOO
items.description: Both ETFs mirror the S&P 500, but key differences in cost and liquidity may influence which fund best aligns with your investment strategy.
